words.def: devoid of good sense or judgment
a person who lacks good judgment
the state of being covered with unclean things
words.zh: n. 土壤, 土地, 國家, 國土, 溫床, 汙物, 糞便, 水池

words.def: a person who lacks good judgment
words.zh: n. 愚人, 受騙者, 奶油拌水果

words.def: any activity that is performed alone without assistance
words.zh: n. 獨奏, 獨唱, 單獨表演

words.def: any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills
words.zh: n. 魚, 魚肉, 魚類, 接合板

words.def: a slippery or viscous liquid or liquefiable substance not miscible with water
words.zh: n. 油, 石油, 油畫顏料
